After the administration spent the past year cutting investments in public health, we need answers on how they’re going to protect people amid this outbreak.

Trump’s continued false claims about the 2020 election should concern all of us.

This isn’t about 2020 anymore. It’s about eroding trust in our elections and in the votes Americans will cast in 2026.

We must protect the integrity of our elections and freedom to vote.

Today I am returning home to be with my family during an incredibly painful and deeply personal time.

There’s a growing divide between what people expect from their government and what they can get from it. 

Working families deserve better than what their president is able to give them.

Earth is the only home we have, so we must all play our part to protect it. 

And the good news is we do not have to choose between a strong economy and strong environment. We can invest in clean energy jobs and a sustainable future. 

This Earth Day, let’s recommit ourselves to

Gas prices up. 

Energy costs up. 

Inflation up. 

Plenty of tax dollars for endless wars. But no tax dollars to invest in America first. It makes no sense.
